case_title: TELELYTICS, LLC VS. DAKOTA PERFORMANCE SOLUTIONS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,912.41 FILED BY TELELYTICS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DAKOTA PERFORMANCE SOLUTIONS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF TELELYTICS, LLC
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT REQUESTING DISMISSAL OF CASE, FILED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-29-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-29-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TELELYTICS, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2008 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-11-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE DENIED; CHALLENGE TO VENUE DENIED. THE CASE IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 11, 2008 AT 1:30PM FOR TRIAL. IN LIEU OF PERSONAL APPEARANCE, DEFENDANT MAY REQUEST IN WRITING THAT IT BE PERMITTED TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED IN FILE. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TELELYTICS, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TELELYTICS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAKOTA PERFORMANCE SOLUTIONS, INC. $2,912.41 PRINCIPAL, $328.80 INTEREST, $51.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,292.71, DEFENDANT DAKOTA PERFORMANCE SOLUTIONS, INC. NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
